name: share-proxy
description: Create public links for media hosted across different platforms

scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-postgres.mjs && pnpm --filter @share-proxy/core --filter @share-proxy/db --filter @share-proxy/adapters --filter @share-proxy/video-player -r run build && pnpm --parallel -r --filter=!share-proxy run dev
scripts.dev:admin: node scripts/ensure-postgres.mjs && pnpm --filter @share-proxy/core --filter @share-proxy/db --filter @share-proxy/adapters --filter @share-proxy/video-player -r run build && pnpm --parallel --filter @share-proxy/core --filter @share-proxy/db --filter @share-proxy/adapters --filter @share-proxy/video-player --filter @share-proxy/admin-api --filter admin-web run dev
scripts.test: node scripts/ensure-postgres.mjs && pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 --if-present run test && playwright test
scripts.test:ci: node scripts/ensure-postgres.mjs && pnpm --filter @share-proxy/core --filter @share-proxy/db --filter @share-proxy/adapters --filter @share-proxy/video-player -r run build && pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 --filter=!share-proxy --if-present run test

author: Sergey Minakov
